subject: Re: Where us
body:
thanks

----- Original Message ----
From: Stephen M. Kosslyn <smkosslyn@wjh.harvard.edu>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, August 9, 2007 8:49:45 PM
Subject: Re: Where us


Hi Jeffrey...

It occurred to me that I hadn't mentioned that we are off to the UK 
on Sunday (I'm giving the "Broadbent Award Lecture" at the British 
Psychological Society -- even though nobody has mentioned whether 
I've won a "Broadbent Award," whatever that is -- and then am giving 
a couple of talks in Dublin). We'll be back on the 28th. Our cell 
phones work well over there (617-642-0901), so please feel free to 
call -- but it's 5 hours later.

I can't even begin to imagine what you are going through, and am more 
than happy to do whatever I possibly can to help (even if it's just 
being a sounding board).

Take good care.

s.
--

thanks
